/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wshadow -Wno-unused-parameter -fopenmp -mavx2 -shared -Wl,-soname,libcyberhex.so -o libcyberhex.so CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/activations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/conv2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/dense.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/distributed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/fused_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/loss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/onnx_export.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/ops_dispatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/precision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/training_protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/transformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/weight_io.cpp.o  -lpthread /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/14/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
